name: Are some cities harder than others for Google Assistant optimization?
description: Yes, competitive cities can be harder because local intent is strong. Accurate local data and strong city pages matter more there.

mainEntity.name: Are some cities harder than others for Google Assistant optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: No single city gets a special Google Assistant rule, but cities like Los Angeles, San Diego, Austin, Denver, and Salt Lake City can be more competitive because local intent is strong. That makes accurate local data and strong service-area content more important.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, competitive cities can be harder because local intent is strong. Accurate local data and strong city pages matter more there.
